pr.title: Improvements to split up: Dolphin support
pr.author: fjooord

summary: Support-directory decomp/matching slice for Dolphin THP and sysdolphin baselib code. The final loaded diff changes four files: THPDec.c improves typed access/readability around __THPDecompressiMCURowNxN, hsd_3B34.c reorders local assignments, synth.c simplifies a sentinel comparison, and cobj.c removes a blank line. Bot reporting records three unmatched-item improvements, while review comments warn against earlier string-literal-to-data-symbol and PAD_STACK-style changes.

key_files.role: Final diff updates __THPDecompressiMCURowNxN to use a local info pointer consistently and access MCU buffers through THPFileInfoMCUBufferView casts instead of a raw offset-derived THPCoeff** local.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists main/dolphin/thp/THPDec __THPDecompressiMCURowNxN +25 bytes 97.01% to 97.37%

key_files.role: Final diff reorders initialization in hsd_803B46D4 so sp8/spC loads from lbl_804DEB88 occur before jmp_buf and temp_r4 assignments.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists main/sysdolphin/baselib/hsd_3B34 hsd_803B46D4 97.31% to 97.36%

key_files.role: Final diff changes HSD_Synth_8038ADD0 comparison from an unsigned add-and-compare idiom to a direct signed sentinel comparison against -0x10001.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev report lists main/sysdolphin/baselib/synth HSD_Synth_8038ADD0 +4 bytes 98.33% to 98.82%

key_files.role: Final diff only removes a blank line in HSD_CObjSetUpVector; review comments show an earlier PAD_STACK(4) proposal in this function was criticized as not an improvement.
Not present in final changed_files for the loaded slice, but review comments discuss earlier attempted string-data changes and regressions in this file.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: PR body Files list includes src/sysdolphin/baselib/particle.c
review_comments: ThePlayerRolo discussion_r3374475361 on static char lbl_8040A540
review_comments: PsiLupan discussion_r3374481524 on msg = lbl_8040A540 regression

what_changed.text: The PR was split from #2617 by support directory, scoped to extern/dolphin/src/dolphin/thp and src/sysdolphin/baselib support code.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Split from #2617 by support directory

what_changed.text: In THPDec.c, __THPDecompressiMCURowNxN now uses the local THPFileInfo* info for xPixelSize, components, and quantTabs, and accesses mcuBuffer through THPFileInfoMCUBufferView casts rather than a local THPCoeff** created from ((u8*) info + 0x10).
In hsd_3B34.c, hsd_803B46D4 assignment order changed around lbl_804DEB88, jmp_buf, and hsd_804D79A0.
In synth.c, HSD_Synth_8038ADD0 replaced (u32)(x8 + 0x10000) == -1U with x8 == -0x10001.
In cobj.c, the final loaded diff only removes whitespace in HSD_CObjSetUpVector, despite a review comment showing an earlier PAD_STACK(4) addition.

smart_moves.text: The PR was split by directory and pathspec from a larger branch, making support-code matching changes easier to review.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Split from #2617 by support directory so the matching improvements are easier to review
human_pr_text: Created from origin/master as an isolated path slice

smart_moves.text: Using an existing local info pointer in THPDec.c reduces repeated direct global __THPInfo accesses in the edited function.

The final diff does not include the reviewed particle.c string-symbol regression or the reviewed cobj.c PAD_STACK(4) addition, suggesting those contentious changes were not present in the loaded final changed-file set.
evidence_refs: changed_files: only THPDec.c, cobj.c, hsd_3B34.c, synth.c
raw_diff: no particle.c hunk and no PAD_STACK addition

decomp_lessons.text: When a struct view can describe repeated offset accesses, prefer a typed overlay/view over raw pointer arithmetic; THPDec.c replaced a THPCoeff** derived from ((u8*) info + 0x10) with THPFileInfoMCUBufferView mcuBuffer accesses.

Do not turn ordinary string literals into address-named byte arrays merely to chase data or labels; reviewers called the particle.c static char lbl_8040A540 change inaccurate and a regression when msg stopped using the literal directly.

PAD_STACK-style fixes need clear evidence of actual improvement; a reviewed HSD_CObjSetUpVector PAD_STACK(4) addition was rejected as not an improvement because the function had other fundamental issues.

Algebraically simpler signed sentinel comparisons may be preferable to unsigned add-and-compare expressions when they preserve the same condition and improve readability, as in synth.c's x8 == -0x10001 change.

naming_conventions.text: Address-style labels such as lbl_804DEB88 and hsd_804D79A0 were preserved in hsd_3B34.c where the diff does not prove stronger semantics.
The reviewed particle.c label lbl_8040A540 was criticized as heavily inaccurate when used to replace direct string literals.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Narrow assignment-order changes were used in hsd_803B46D4, moving sp8/spC loads before jmp_buf/temp_r4 setup; bot reporting shows a small unmatched-item percentage improvement for that function but no match claim.
Expression normalization in synth.c changed an unsigned wrapped comparison into a direct negative constant comparison; bot reporting records +4 bytes and a score improvement for HSD_Synth_8038ADD0.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev report HSD_Synth_8038ADD0 +4 bytes 98.33% to 98.82%

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Review feedback treats PAD_STACK as a questionable local tactic when the underlying function is still fundamentally unresolved.

review_feedback.author: ThePlayerRolo
review_feedback.text: A static char array label for many error strings was probably inaccurate to original developer source; suggested trying a const char* table and otherwise reverting the label, because the original likely directly input the strings.

review_feedback.author: PsiLupan
review_feedback.text: Replacing msg = "MCC is no initialize" with msg = lbl_8040A540 was called a regression due to not using the string.

review_feedback.author: PsiLupan
review_feedback.text: Adding PAD_STACK(4) in HSD_CObjSetUpVector was called not an improvement because the function has other fundamental issues.

searchable_terms: Improvements to split up: Dolphin support
follow_up_queries: PR 2632 particle.c lbl_8040A540 string literal regression

evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report and review comments
notes: Final changed_files lists four files, but the PR body Files section lists six files including particle.c and sislib.c. The loaded final diff contains no particle.c or sislib.c hunks.

Review comments reference earlier particle.c and PAD_STACK changes that are not present in the final loaded diff; they are treated as review feedback and cautionary lessons, not as final merged code changes.
The PR body's preliminary full-source-branch report is explicitly not authoritative for this slice; the decomp-dev bot report is narrower and records three unmatched-item improvements.
No objdiff logs or full CI results are loaded beyond the bot report and PR-body local checks, so no exact match claims are made.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use typed struct views instead of raw offset-derived pointer locals when evidence supports the layout
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2632, THPDec.c replaced a THPCoeff** local computed from ((u8*) info + 0x10) with accesses through ((THPFileInfoMCUBufferView*) info)->mcuBuffer[n] inside __THPDecompressiMCURowNxN. This is a reusable example of typed-fields-over-pointer-math cleanup in Dolphin THP code.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Reviewers rejected replacing direct strings with address-named byte-array labels in particle.c
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2632 review comments on particle.c warned that a static char lbl_8040A540 byte array and msg = lbl_8040A540 replacement were likely inaccurate and regressed by not using direct string literals. Treat this as PR evidence supporting the existing no-string-literal-symbol-regression standard.

accepted_candidate_records.title: PAD_STACK additions are not inherently improvements
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2632 review feedback on HSD_CObjSetUpVector said a PAD_STACK(4) addition was not an improvement because the function had other fundamental issues. This supports keeping PAD_STACK-style tactics narrow and evidence-backed.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the PR-body preliminary full-branch matched-code percentages as slice validation; the body says per-PR CI/decomp-dev reporting is authoritative, and only a narrow bot report is loaded.
Do not record particle.c or sislib.c as final changed files for this slice; they appear in the PR body file list and review comments but not in the loaded changed_files metadata or final diff.
Do not infer that reviewers approved any final replacement for particle.c strings; loaded review evidence only criticizes the attempted label/string change.
Do not claim HSD_CObjSetUpVector was improved by PAD_STACK; final diff does not include PAD_STACK and review feedback rejects that tactic in context.
